name: Jellicent
flavor: Whenever a full moon hangs in the night sky, schools of Jellicent gather near the surface of the sea, waiting for their prey to appear.

ability.name: Bouncy Body
ability.effect: If this Pokémon is in the Active Spot and is damaged by an attack from your opponent's Pokémon, take a [Water] Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.
